---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Time Series Differences"
image: social-cards/time-series-diff.png
---

# 🏗️ Differences {#sec-time-series-diff}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Differences
:::

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
